title: Wave 35 - Manager assignment decision timeline parity
description: Coordinate architecture, backend, mobile, and QA work so managers can review an additive assignment decision summary and a richer decision timeline directly from assignment detail without breaking the current contract.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 35 scope is documented for architect, backend, mobile, and QA
Jira epic can be created directly from the task file
Scope aligns with manager assignment decision timeline parity and keeps contract changes additive
